title: Michele Carter
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
{{Otheruses|Carter}}
'''Michele Carter''' is a [[roleplaying game]] writer and editor.

Carter wrote [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]] articles for the unlicensed ''[[Polyhedron]]'' magazine issues [[Polyhedron 93|93]], [[Polyhedron 94|94]], [[Polyhedron 97|97]], [[Polyhedron 99|99]], [[Polyhedron 103|103]] and [[Polyhedron 104|104]], and edited the [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s ''[[Hero's Guide]]'', ''[[Power of the Jedi Sourcebook]]'' and ''[[The Dark Side Sourcebook]]''.

{{Bio-stub}}
